expectations.text: Reads session JSONL transcripts (not just CHANGELOG)
expectations.evidence: Report header: 'Sources: JSONL transcripts, CHANGELOG.md, HANDOFF.md, 28 memory files'. Incident log cites specific sessions.
Phase 2 has full compliance matrix for all 11 rules with per-rule status and evidence.

expectations.text: Categorizes findings using taxonomy (RULE_VIOLATION, RULE_GAP, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Phase 3 uses 5 categories: PATTERN_REPEAT (8), RULE_VIOLATION (3), RULE_GAP (1), RULE_STALE (1), HOOK_GAP (1).

expectations.text: Each proposal cites specific session evidence
expectations.evidence: Every proposal in Phase 4 starts with 'Evidence: S49', 'Evidence: S50-S51', etc.
All 10 proposals include Target file, Change description, and Draft markdown text.

expectations.text: Does NOT auto-apply changes to rules/skills/hooks
expectations.evidence: Report saved to workspace outputs only. No Edit/Write to .claude/rules/ or .claude/skills/.
Agent notification confirms: 'Canonical copy: insights/references/latest-report.md'. Saved to BOTH workspace and insights/references/.
